content.body:
Users got no output after make install, and the binary wasn't found
because GOPATH/bin wasn't in PATH. Now prints install location and
warns with instructions when PATH is missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix(cli): add install feedback and PATH warning to make install
